013 *  See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
014 *  limitations under the License.
015 */
016package edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.model.entity;
017
018import com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonIgnore;
019import jakarta.persistence.Column;
020import jakarta.persistence.Entity;
021import jakarta.persistence.FetchType;
022import jakarta.persistence.GeneratedValue;
023import jakarta.persistence.GenerationType;
024import jakarta.persistence.Id;
025import jakarta.persistence.Index;
026import jakarta.persistence.OneToMany;
027import jakarta.persistence.OrderBy;
028import jakarta.persistence.PrePersist;
029import jakarta.persistence.Table;
030import jakarta.persistence.UniqueConstraint;
031import java.net.URL;
032import java.time.Instant;
033import java.util.LinkedList;
034import java.util.List;
035import java.util.UUID;
036import org.hibernate.annotations.CreationTimestamp;
037
038/**
039 * JPA entity representing a user profile backed by an OAuth subject key.
040 */
041@Entity
042@Table(
043  name = "user_profile",
044  uniqueConstraints = {
045    @UniqueConstraint(name = "uk_user_profile_oauth_key", columnNames = "oauth_key")
046  },
047  indexes = {
048    @Index(name = "ix_user_profile_email", columnList = "email"),
049    @Index(name = "ix_user_profile_user_enabled", columnList = "user_enabled")
050  }
051)
052public class UserProfile {
053
054  @Id
055  @Column(name = "user_profile_id", updatable = false)
056  @GeneratedValue(strategy = GenerationType.IDENTITY)
057  @JsonIgnore
058  private Long id;
059
060  @Column(name = "user_profile_external_id", updatable = false)
061  private UUID externalId;
062
063  @Column(nullable = false, updatable = false)
064  @JsonIgnore
065  private String oauthKey;
066
067  @Column(nullable = false)
068  private String displayName;
069
070  @Column(nullable = false)
071  private String email;
072
073  @Column(nullable = true, updatable = true)
074  private URL avatar;
075
076  @Column(name = "avatar_key")
077  @JsonIgnore
078  private String avatarKey;
079
080  @Column(name = "avatar_mime_type")
081  @JsonIgnore
082  private String avatarMimeType;
083
084  @Column(nullable = false)
085  private boolean isManager;
086
087  @CreationTimestamp
088  @Column(
089    nullable = false,
090    updatable = false
091  )
092  private Instant timeCreated;
093
094  @Column(nullable = false)
095  private boolean userEnabled;
096
097  // used AI to help with OneToMany annotation
098  @OneToMany(mappedBy = "userProfile", fetch = FetchType.LAZY)
099  @OrderBy("timeLastModified DESC")
100  @JsonIgnore
101  private final List<IssueReport> issueReports = new LinkedList<>();
102
103  /**
104   * Returns the database identifier for this user profile.
105   *
106   * @return primary key value.
107   */
108  public Long getId() {
109    return id;
110  }
111
112  /**
113   * Returns the external identifier for this user profile.
114   *
115   * @return external ID.
116   */
117  public UUID getExternalId() {
118    return externalId;
119  }
120
121  /**
122   * Returns the OAuth subject key for this user.
123   *
124   * @return OAuth key.
125   */
126  public String getOauthKey() {
127    return oauthKey;
128  }
129
130  /**
131   * Sets the OAuth subject key for this user.
132   *
133   * @param oauthKey OAuth key.
134   */
135  public void setOauthKey(String oauthKey) {
136    this.oauthKey = oauthKey;
137  }
138
139  /**
140   * Returns the display name for this user.
141   *
142   * @return display name.
143   */
144  public String getDisplayName() {
145    return displayName;
146  }
147
148  /**
149   * Sets the display name for this user profile.
150   *
151   * @param displayName Display name.
152   */
153  public void setDisplayName(String displayName) {
154    this.displayName = displayName;
155  }
156
157  /**
158   * Returns the avatar URL, if configured.
159   *
160   * @return avatar URL.
161   */
162  public URL getAvatar() {
163    return avatar;
164  }
165
166  /**
167   * Sets the avatar URL.
168   *
169   * @param avatar avatar URL.
170   */
171  public void setAvatar(URL avatar) {
172    this.avatar = avatar;
173  }
174
175  /**
176   * Returns the storage key for a locally stored custom avatar, if set.
177   *
178   * @return avatar storage key (or {@code null}).
179   */
180  public String getAvatarKey() {
181    return avatarKey;
182  }
183
184  /**
185   * Sets the storage key for a locally stored custom avatar.
186   *
187   * @param avatarKey storage key.
188   */
189  public void setAvatarKey(String avatarKey) {
190    this.avatarKey = avatarKey;
191  }
192
193  /**
194   * Returns the MIME type for a locally stored custom avatar, if set.
195   *
196   * @return avatar MIME type (or {@code null}).
197   */
198  public String getAvatarMimeType() {
199    return avatarMimeType;
200  }
201
202  /**
203   * Sets the MIME type for a locally stored custom avatar.
204   *
205   * @param avatarMimeType avatar MIME type.
206   */
207  public void setAvatarMimeType(String avatarMimeType) {
208    this.avatarMimeType = avatarMimeType;
209  }
210
211  /**
212   * Returns the email address.
213   *
214   * @return email address.
215   */
216  public String getEmail() {
217    return email;
218  }
219
220  /**
221   * Sets the email address.
222   *
223   * @param email email address.
224   */
225  public void setEmail(String email) {
226    this.email = email;
227  }
228
229  /**
230   * Returns whether this user has manager privileges.
231   *
232   * @return {@code true} if manager; {@code false} otherwise.
233   */
234  public boolean isManager() {
235    return isManager;
236  }
237
238  /**
239   * Sets whether this user has manager privileges.
240   *
241   * @param isManager {@code true} if manager; {@code false} otherwise.
242   */
243  public void setIsManager(boolean isManager) {
244    this.isManager = isManager;
245  }
246
247  /**
248   * Returns the time this user profile was created.
249   *
250   * @return creation timestamp.
251   */
252  public Instant getTimeCreated() {
253    return timeCreated;
254  }
255
256  /**
257   * Returns whether the user account is enabled.
258   *
259   * @return {@code true} if enabled; {@code false} otherwise.
260   */
261  public boolean getUserEnabled() {
262    return userEnabled;
263  }
264
265  /**
266   * Sets whether the user account is enabled.
267   *
268   * @param userEnabled {@code true} to enable; {@code false} to disable.
269   */
270  public void setUserEnabled(boolean userEnabled) {
271    this.userEnabled = userEnabled;
272  }
273
274  /**
275   * Returns the issue reports created by this user.
276   *
277   * @return issue reports.
278   */
279  public List<IssueReport> getIssueReports() {
280    return issueReports;
281  }
282
283  @PrePersist
284  void onCreate() {
285    this.externalId = UUID.randomUUID();
286  }
287}
